title: athanasia alba
intro: Athanasia alba, also known as White Yarrow or Devil's Nettle, is a perennial herb belonging to the Asteraceae family. Its medicinal properties are attributed to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, making it a popular remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Athanasia alba include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate menstrual cramps, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and promote wound healing. Athanasia alba can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
